excerpt: With Renterra’s platform and integrated marketing suite, All Equip Rental has transformed both how they attract new customers and how they operate day to day. Their team now captures a meaningful share of revenue online, while targeted digital campaigns consistently outperform expectations.

Rental businesses are using equipment rental software integrations to break free from local limitations and dominate new markets online; one multi-location case ties the approach to increasing website visibility, gross rental revenue, and net new customers.

Across Renterra's customer base, many rental businesses now generate more than 25% of their rental activity directly through their online storefronts. Many have generated well over $100,000 in online rental revenue through digital channels.
Renterra’s built-in ROI Dashboard ties ad spend directly to rental orders—so you can finally see which campaigns are actually bringing in money.
